commands.review_summary:
Adds a gateway-side fresh node exec-approvals read before node policy writes, normalizes node approval snapshot/hash payloads, and adds focused handler tests.

PR surface: Source +79, Tests +183. Total +262 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main forwards exec.approvals.node.set directly to the node set command without a gateway-side fresh read, while the branch adds tests for stale, missing, native-hash, and matching base-hash flows. I did not run live repro commands because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair job is needed because there are no actionable line-level findings; the draft maintainer PR needs normal maintainer review and broad validation before merge.

target.title: fix(gateway): guard node approval policy writes
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a gateway-side fresh read before `exec.approvals.node.set` forwards node approval policy writes.
- Reject missing/stale `baseHash` values against the current node snapshot so stale UI/CLI state cannot overwrite newer node approval rules.
- Normalize both canonical approval snapshots and the Windows-native node payload shape before compare-and-set.
- Add focused gateway handler coverage for stale, missing, matching, and Windows-native node approval hash flows.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.ts src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approvals.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean
- CI on head `c642e1d`: 49 checks ok / 0 attention in draft PR status
- Azure crabbox live check: direct stale `exec.approvals.node.set` against the Windows-native node payload is rejected with `exec approvals changed since last load; re-run exec.approvals.node.get and retry`
- Azure crabbox policy cleanup: restored the node approval policy to its original `defaultAction=deny`, 22-rule state after testing

## Notes
- Earlier local `tsgo` lanes passed on the branch before the Windows-native payload update; the rerun after that update was blocked because this Codex worktree's shared `node_modules` symlink target disappeared. I did not run `pnpm install` inside the Codex worktree.
- `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 node scripts/check-changed.mjs` could not complete locally because the delegated Blacksmith Testbox sync failed before running checks: `runner@... Permission denied (publickey)`, then the wrapper stopped its Testbox.
- Changelog entry intentionally omitted; autoreview confirmed the root changelog is release-owned for normal fixes.
target.author: vincentkoc
